title: MUJERES APOYANDO MUJERES - 211info
text: CONSEJO HISPANO MUJERES APOYANDO MUJERES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A support group providing a safe space to talk with other women. Topics include healthy relationships and domestic violence. Zumba is offered with a certified instructor. Snacks, refreshments, and childcare are provided during the group. 565 12th Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female and their children Hours: Thursday 5:30pm-7:30pm Bob Chisholm Community Center 1225 Avenue A Seaside, OR 97138 Email (503) 325-4547 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 325-4547 Alternate (971) 377-0167 Guadalupe Beltran Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop County SITE HOURS: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm In-person: Tuesday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Services: Domestic Violence Support Groups * Hispanic/Latino Community Women's Support Groups * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - SEASONAL FOOD BOXES LEGAL SERVICES - DOCUMENT ASSISTANCE AND NOTARY PUBLIC TAX ORGANIZATIONS AND SERVICES - ECONOMIC EMPOWERMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONSEJO HISPANO
